summary: Iteration 90: Weekly BI Email Digest enhancement fully tested. All 5 new digest endpoints working (21/21 pytest tests passed - 100%). Frontend Digest tab fully functional with email preview, settings management, send now, toggle, and history display.
seed_data_creation: Digest settings already had 2 recipients (gm@resort.com, owner@resort.com). Multiple manual sends created history entries.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 90 verified Weekly BI Email Digest enhancement. 5 new endpoints at /api/enterprise-bi/digest/*: preview (returns data snapshot + HTML), settings (GET/PUT recipients, schedule, enabled), send (POST manual trigger), history (past sends). Frontend DigestTab component has email preview (left panel), settings panel (right side with recipients list, add/remove, toggle), send now button, and send history with trigger type badges. Emails are demo-logged to MongoDB 'email_log' collection (no SENDGRID_API_KEY set). Scheduler has cron job for Monday 7 AM. All 7 original Enterprise BI endpoints still working (regression verified).

backend_api_tests: GET /api/enterprise-bi/digest/preview - returns 200, has data snapshot (occupancy, adr, revpar, mpi, ari, rgi, total_revenue, gop, gop_margin, otb_next_7d, market_position) and HTML email content
GET /api/enterprise-bi/digest/settings - returns 200, has recipients array, schedule_day, schedule_hour, enabled boolean
PUT /api/enterprise-bi/digest/settings - updates recipients list, toggle enabled, returns status 'updated'
POST /api/enterprise-bi/digest/send - with recipients returns 'sent' status with digest record (id, sent_at, recipients, data_snapshot, trigger='manual')
POST /api/enterprise-bi/digest/send - without recipients returns 'skipped' with reason
GET /api/enterprise-bi/digest/history - returns total count and history array with id, sent_at, recipients, data_snapshot, trigger
REGRESSION: GET /api/enterprise-bi/str/dashboard - returns 200 with indices, comp_set, trend_12m
REGRESSION: GET /api/enterprise-bi/pnl/waterfall - returns 200 with waterfall, summary
REGRESSION: GET /api/enterprise-bi/portfolio/dashboard - returns 200 with properties, portfolio_summary
frontend_tests: Enterprise BI Suite panel opens from sidebar with data-testid='enterprise-bi-panel'
Digest tab accessible via data-testid='bi-tab-digest' (5th tab labeled 'Weekly Digest')
Email Preview panel shows styled HTML with Weekly BI Digest title, STR Index Scores (MPI 106.0, ARI 111.6, RGI 118.3), P&L Snapshot, Key Metrics
Settings panel shows ENABLED toggle (green), Recipients list (gm@resort.com, owner@resort.com)
Add button (data-testid='digest-add-recipient') adds recipient to list
Remove button removes recipient from list
Toggle button (data-testid='digest-toggle') switches between ENABLED (green) and DISABLED (red)
Send Now button (data-testid='digest-send-now') triggers manual send, shows 'Sent to 2 recipients' success message
Send History shows past digests with timestamp, recipient count, RGI, GOP, and MANUAL trigger badge (amber color)
Tab switching works between Comp Set (STR), P&L Waterfall, Portfolio, PMS Bridge, Weekly Digest

digest_preview.details: Returns data snapshot with all BI metrics (occupancy, ADR, RevPAR, MPI, ARI, RGI, revenue, GOP) and styled HTML email content

digest_settings.details: GET/PUT for recipients list, schedule_day (monday), schedule_hour (7), enabled flag. Persists to MongoDB bi_digest_settings collection

digest_send.details: Manual trigger sends to all configured recipients, logs to bi_digest_history with trigger='manual'. Returns 'skipped' when no recipients

digest_history.details: Returns past digest sends with id, sent_at, recipients, data_snapshot, trigger type. Supports limit parameter

email_demo_logging.details: Emails demo-logged to MongoDB 'email_log' collection with status='demo_logged' (no SENDGRID_API_KEY set)

scheduler_cron.details: APScheduler cron job configured for Monday 7 AM (day_of_week='mon', hour=7, minute=0)

mocked_apis.sendgrid_emails: Emails are demo-logged to MongoDB 'email_log' collection (no SENDGRID_API_KEY set). Ready to go live when key is provided.
mocked_apis.digest_data: Uses live MongoDB data for occupancy/revenue from hk_rooms, ird_orders, guest_orders, spa_appointments collections
